name: 5' x 7' Plaid Outdoor Rug Yellow/Green - Threshold™: Woven, Lightweight, Patio Deck Area Rug
description:
Make your mudroom, patio, deck or backyard as warm and inviting as your living room with the Plaid Outdoor Rug from Threshold™. Made of lightweight material, this rectangular area rug showcases a woven pattern of multicolored checks for a timeless look. The woven area rug sports a flat-pile construction that allows for easy cleaning and effortless placement, and the spray latex backing helps keep it in place wherever you choose to spread it.

Threshold™: Quality & Design / Casual classics for house and home.
